Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log for a fictional financial services company. Cases represent support tickets. Each case has events with Activity, Timestamp, Resource, Additional Context. Some activities repeat within a case. We need to identify those that appear multiple times and rename them to reflect contextual differences.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In C001, Verify Documents occurs twice: first time is initial verification of documents, second time is re-verification after receiving missing docs.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In C002, Call Customer repeats: first is to clarify account discrepancy, second is follow-up to confirm adjustments.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In C003, Verify Documents repeats: first is initial physical verification, second is re-verify after account adjustment.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The task says: Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case. So we only care about activities that repeat in a single case.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Initiate Request appears once per case but with different channels across cases. But since not repeated within a case, no need to rename.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The prompt asks: Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case and interpret how their meaning changes depending on their position in the process or the associated context. For each activity that recurs, rename them to reflect their context.

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Debate about renaming Call Customer across cases even if not repeated in same case, but decide to stick to within-case repetitions only.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For C001: First Verify Documents -> Initial Document Verification, Second -> Re-verify Documents after Submission. For C002: First Call Customer -> Call Customer - Clarify Discrepancy, Second -> Call Customer - Follow-up Confirmation. For C003: First -> Physical ID Verification, Second -> Re-verify Documents After Adjustment.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Choose names that are self-explanatory and aligned with process, using contextual clues like position, additional context, resource.
